form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 6.5m finishing third behind Kelowna Legend at Rambouillet over 2800m in a 6yo handicap on March 29 at $5.50. form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th over 2150m at Mauquenchy, beaten 39m by Katia Dhelpa in 6-8yo race on April 2 at $8. form.formComment: Last start 5th (25m) over 2850m at Maure-de-Bretagne, beaten 18m by Kingston De Blary in 6-7yo handicap on March 24 at $70.
